message:
🐛 Fix settings sync showing "Backend offline" and add sync indicator (#800)

The usePersistedSettings hook was blocked by two issues:
1. It fired before OAuth completed, causing UnauthenticatedError
2. The api module's checkBackendAvailability() had stale cached status

Fix: bypass the api module's availability cache with a direct fetch
helper (settingsFetch), and gate on useAuth().isAuthenticated so the
hook waits for login before contacting the backend.

Also adds a compact sync status indicator (saved/saving/error/offline)
below the Settings page heading in both sidebar and mobile views.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
